kycV3.t1: Why do I need to complete KYC for my HEWE Mastercard?
kycV3.t2: KYC is mandatory for security and regulatory reasons. It helps us confirm your identity and ensures the safety of your account. Without completing KYC, you won’t be able to access the full benefits of your HEWE Mastercard, such as higher transaction limits.
kycV3.t3: How long does it take for my KYC verification to be completed?
kycV3.t4: Are my documents safe with HEWE
kycV3.t5: What should I do if my KYC verification fails?
kycV3.t6: What types of documents are accepted for KYC?
kycV3.t7: Can I update my KYC details later?
kycV3.t8: How can I contact support if I have any questions?
kycV3.t11: Step 3: Selfie Holding Your ID Card
kycV3.t15: KYC (Know Your Customer) Process for HEWE Mastercard
kycV3.t16: At HEWE, we prioritize your security and the integrity of your transactions. To ensure compliance with global financial regulations and safeguard your account, completing the KYC process is mandatory. Below is a simple step-by-step guide for allowing you to access your HEWE Mastercard and other services smoothly.
kycV3.t19: Fill out the following fields carefully to ensure your information matches your uploaded documents:
kycV3.t20: First Name & Last Name: As displayed on your identification document.
kycV3.t22: Phone Number: Enter a valid phone number with the correct country code.
kycV3.t23: Email (Emergency Contact): Provide an email address to be used as an emergency.
kycV3.t24: Date of Birth: Enter your birthdate in the correct format.
kycV3.t25: Address: Your full residential address, including state, city, and zip code.
kycV3.t26: Nationality: Select your nationality from the dropdown list.
kycV3.t27: Once all the information is entered correctly, you can proceed to submit your KYC application.
kycV3.t28: What Happens After You Submit Your Documents?
kycV3.t29: Once you have submitted your documents and information, the following steps will occur:
kycV3.t30: Document Verification: Our team will review your documents and verify that the information matches your provided personal details.
kycV3.t31: Secure Data Handling: All your personal data and uploaded documents are stored in compliance with GDPR and other global privacy regulations. We use encryption to protect your documents, ensuring that your personal information remains confidential.
kycV3.t32: Approval Process: The verification process typically takes between 24 to 48 hours. If there are any discrepancies or issues with the documents, you will be notified with instructions on how to resolve them.
kycV3.t33: Access to Full Features: Once your KYC verification is complete, you’ll be able to access all the features of your HEWE Mastercard, including increased transaction limits and additional services.
kycV3.t34: Once all the information is entered correctly, you can proceed to submit your KYC application.
kycV3.t36: You will need to upload your identification document (ID card or passport) to verify your identity
kycV3.t37: Front of the Document: Upload a clear image showing your name, photograph,date of birth, and the expiration date of your identification.
kycV3.t38: Back of the Document: Upload the back side of your identification if applicable, ensuring the image is clear and all details are readable.
kycV3.t39: Step 3: Selfie Holding Your ID Card
kycV3.t40: To verify that the ID you provided belongs to you, upload an image of yourself holding the identification document. Ensure the image is clear and that your face and the document details are visible. Additionally, you must also hold a blank piece of paper with 'AMCHAIN' and the date of KYC (i.e., the date you are processing the KYC) clearly written on it.
kycV3.t42: Security: KYC helps protect your account from unauthorized access and identity theft. Compliance: It ensures that we comply with global regulations and financial security standards. Unlock Full Features: Completing KYC unlocks all features of HEWE Mastercard, including higher transaction limits and additional services.
kycV3.t44: Security: KYC helps protect your account from unauthorized access and identity theft.
kycV3.t45: Compliance: It ensures that we comply with global regulations and financial security standards.
kycV3.t46: Unlock Full Features: Completing KYC unlocks all features of HEWE Mastercard, including higher transaction limits and additional services.
kycV3.t48: If you encounter any issues or have any questions while completing the KYC process, we’re here to help! Our support team is available to assist you via email.
kycV3.t49: Our team will review your documents and verify that the information matches your provided personal details. The verification process typically takes between 24 to 48 hours.
kycV3.t50: All your personal data and uploaded documents are stored in compliance with GDPR and other global privacy regulations. We use encryption to protect your documents, ensuring that your personal information remains confidential.
kycV3.t51: If there are any discrepancies or issues with the documents, you will be notified with instructions on how to resolve them.
kycV3.t52: You will need to upload both the front and back of your identification document (ID card or passport) along with a blank piece of paper showing the writing  'AMCHAIN' on it in addition to the date of KYC (the date you are processing the KYC) to verify your identity.
kycV3.t54: Our support team is available to assist you via email at support@hewe.io OR you can send your inquiries by completing the form on the ‘Help Centre’ tab at the bottom footer of our website.
